title: Tool Promt
description: A mod that will help players remember the durability of their tools!
body:
### 🛠️ ToolPrompter
Have you ever been deep in a mining session or halfway through a massive build, only to realize your Max-Enchanted Pickaxe just shattered? Tool Prompt is a lightweight utility mod designed to keep you informed about your tool's health without distracting you from the gameplay.

### ✨ Features
ToolPrompter acts as your personal equipment monitor. It tracks the durability of your active items and sends timely alerts directly to your chat when your tool reaches specific wear-and-tear milestones:
- 75% Remaining: A friendly heads-up.
- 50% Remaining: Halfway there-time to start thinking about a trip home.
- 3% Remaining (CRITICAL): The final alert. Stop using the tool immediately to prevent permanent breakage!

### 🛠 Technical Info
- Client-side.
- Server-side.
- Works with all standard tools, weapons, and items with durability.
- Dependencies: Fabric API
